abilities.description: Muerta fires a ghostly trickshot at an enemy unit or tree. When the bullet strikes, it damages and briefly slows, then ricochets in the targeted direction. The ricochet damages all units that it passes through, stopping when it hits a hero. Heroes hit by the ricochet are feared away from the impact.
abilities.name: Dead Shot
abilities.story: A steady gunhand and an eternity of practice produce trickshots that defy the mortal mind.

abilities.description: Summons a group of 4 revenants that slowly circle the targeted location. Enemies within the area are slowed and have reduced attack speed. Revenants deal damage and silence enemies as they pass through them. Enemy heroes killed inside the Calling refresh its duration and create another Revenant.
params: Passive ComponentRevenant Increase per Hero Kill: 1
abilities.name: The Calling
abilities.story: Muerta's family are forever beyond the spirit veil, but her deal with Death allows her to briefly call on them in times of want or need.

abilities.description: Toggleable. When toggled on, Muerta's attacks have a chance to fire a second shot at another target.
abilities.name: Gunslinger
abilities.story: Muerta offers all of her victims Mercy. Some are fortunate enough to also earn Grace.

abilities.description: Muerta precisely shoots a hero in their soul, separating it from their physical body and knocking it 150 units away. The soul is untargetable, muted, disarmed, and invulnerable for 4 seconds. The body is stunned and has 35% damage reduction for this duration. After the effect ends the hero's soul is forcefully returned to their body applying a strong dispel. The soul will survive until the end of the effect even if the hero is killed.
abilities.name: Parting Shot

abilities.description: Muerta transforms, becoming immune to physical damage. All of her attack damage is dealt as magical damage. Muerta gains bonus attack damage and phased movement. Muerta can attack ethereal units, but deals no damage to Magic Immune targets.
params: Passive Component[picture:aghanim's_shard_symbol] Enemy Death Radius: 925[picture:aghanim's_shard_symbol] Spell Amp Bonus per Kill: 2%
abilities.name: Pierce the Veil
abilities.story: Muerta sheds her corporeal form, crossing the spirit veil and striking her enemies with the fury of the damned.

description: Blasts fearsome trickshots and unleashes ethereal ruin. Muerta is a master of death who stalks the lands of life, corralling targets with fearsome Trickshots from an eternity of practice that defies the mortal mind. Her family are forever beyond the spirit veil, but her deal with Death allows her to briefly call on them — The Revenants — in times of want or need to smother her foes. Always ready to pick off unwary targets with her Spare Gunhand and Parting Shots, Muerta offers all of her victims Mercy, and some, are fortunate enough to also earn Grace — one gun to deliver the soul, and the other, to claim the soul. Muerta is at her most menacing when she sheds her corporeal form, Crossing the Veil of the Dead to strike her enemies with the ethereal fury of the damned.  Carry Nuker Disabler  Blue, Cape, Female, Green, Undead, Nose Legs ( 2 )
trivia: According to Revenant's Brooch lore: The cursed brooch of a fallen guardian who stalks forever between the veil of life and death., the item's owner is likely to be Muerta. She can be also seen wearing a brooch around her neck in her official trailer.
She can be also seen wearing a brooch around her neck in her official trailer.

An easter egg was added for the Hero release. Each player in game had to buy the item Forebearer's Fortune and use it, giving each player a Scrying Shovel, players then had to dig around the map, guided by Muerta's Voice/Ally Chat to the correct location. Digging at the correct location gave people an Beloved Memory, offering the Item at Muerta's Effigy, would give players the Item Mercy & Grace.
Muerta is likely based on early concepts of a unreleased hero "Ghost Revenant" developed during the DotA era.
